backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing a brand directory with CRUD operations for t-shirt brands, storing brand name, website, and price range with auto-incrementing IDs.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting four implemented features: brand listing page, brand card display, add brand form, and modern fashion-themed styling.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of frontend files describing the React app structure with TanStack Router, brand management UI, and fashion-forward styling.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS base styles defining OKLCH color system variables for light and dark modes with a neutral grayscale palette.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the T-Shirt Brand Directory app with root div and module script reference.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component configuring TanStack Router with a layout wrapper and brands page as the index route.
frontend/src/components/AddBrandForm.tsx: Form component with validation for adding new brands, accepting name, website URL, and min/max price inputs with error handling.
frontend/src/components/BrandCard.tsx: Card component displaying brand logo placeholder, name, price range badge, website link, and visit button with hover effects.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component showing copyright, current year, and attribution link to caffeine.ai with UTM tracking parameters.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header with shopping bag icon, T-Shirt Hub branding, and subtitle in a backdrop-blurred navigation bar.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Layout wrapper providing header, main content outlet, and footer structure for all pages.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook managing ICP actor creation with Internet Identity authentication, returning authenticated or anonymous actor based on login state.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity storage, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching all brands (useGetAllBrands) and adding a new brand (useAddBrand) using the actor from useActor hook.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining colors for UI components using OKLCH color space.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/BrandsPage.tsx: Main brands page component displaying a hero banner, grid of brand cards, and a dialog with AddBrandForm for adding new brands.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration defining custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system, typography, container settings, animations, and custom shadows.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking completed features (brand display, add form, modern theme) and pending requirements for backend data model and methods.
